data.name: ScanSummary_Running
data.value: Scan in progress… ({0:N0} file(s) scanned so far)

data.name: Scan_ReadyDegraded
data.value: Limited scan — check signatures in Antivirus.

data.name: Ui_ProtectionTray
data.value: optiCombat minimized to the system tray

data.name: Status_SigUpdateRunning
data.value: A signature update is already in progress.

data.name: Confirm_PurgeQuarantine
data.value: Permanently delete {0} quarantine item(s)? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Notif_UsbScanThreatsBody
data.value: {2:N0} files scanned — see History for details

data.name: Status_UsbScanComplete
data.value: USB scan of {0} complete — {1:N0} file(s), {2} threat(s)

data.name: Status_UsbScanFailed
data.value: USB scan of {0} interrupted or failed

data.name: Notif_RtpStartedBody
data.value: optiCombat is monitoring files in the background

data.name: Overview_ProtectedSub
data.value: Definitions are up to date — your PC is protected.

data.name: Overview_StatsNoHistory
data.value: • No scans recorded — run a scan from Antivirus.

data.name: Overview_StatsNone30
data.value: • No scans in the last 30 days (older sessions: History tab).

data.name: Overview_StatsTreatHint
data.value: • Threats to remediate: History or Scan tab.

data.name: Overview_PartialScanBanner
data.value: Partial scan — some system folders are inaccessible without administrator rights.

data.name: Av_ScanHint
data.value: Your files are being scanned in depth. You can stop at any time.

data.name: Clean_Sub
data.value: Free up space by removing unnecessary files.

data.name: Clean_BrowserSub
data.value: Default browser profiles only (Firefox: primary profile)

data.name: Clean_LogHint
data.value: Click Analyze to estimate recoverable space (temporary files and selected browser caches).

data.name: Clean_EmptySub
data.value: No recoverable files were found during analysis.

data.name: Hist_Sub
data.value: Log of scans, cleanups, and security actions.

data.name: Opt_NotifSub
data.value: Alerts when a threat is detected or an update is available

data.name: Opt_DarkSub
data.value: Same setting as the Mode button in the sidebar

data.name: Opt_ThemeLightSub
data.value: Windows is in dark mode — check to use the light theme in optiCombat. Uncheck to follow the Windows theme.

data.name: Opt_ThemeDarkSub
data.value: Windows is in light mode — check to use the dark theme in optiCombat. Uncheck to follow the Windows theme.

data.name: Opt_LanguageSub
data.value: French or English — restart required to apply everywhere

data.name: Opt_LangRestartMessage
data.value: optiCombat will restart to display the interface in the selected language.

data.name: Opt_RtpSub
data.value: Quick-scan folders (Temp, Startup, Prefetch…) and expanded risky extensions.

data.name: Opt_ProcessMonitorSub
data.value: Scans executables and scripts at startup (WMI) — complements file RTP.

data.name: Opt_TamperProtectionSub
data.value: Restarts optiCombat in the background if real-time protection is expected but the app was closed.

data.name: Opt_PlatformProtectionSub
data.value: RTP/AMSI/minifilter engine in optiCombat.Service (IPC). Advanced layer — awaiting a signed kernel driver.

data.name: Opt_PlatformProtectionPlanned
data.value: Planned in 3–5 years (EV-signed driver + Microsoft Partner Center). Not available today — user-mode real-time protection remains active.

data.name: Platform_IpcInactive
data.value: IPC service unreachable (local RTP fallback possible)

data.name: Platform_DefenderMayOverride
data.value: Defender active — may take AMSI priority on scripts

data.name: Platform_MinifilterNotLoaded
data.value: Minifilter present but not loaded (test signing / admin)

data.name: Platform_MinifilterAbsent
data.value: Kernel minifilter absent (stub — PE not intercepted)

data.name: Platform_PlannedUnavailable
data.value: Platform layer in development — activation planned in 3–5 years. Current protection: user-mode file monitoring.

data.name: Opt_BackupBeforeQuarantineSub
data.value: Keeps a local copy (32 MB max.) in %LocalAppData%\optiCombat\SafetyBackups.

data.name: Opt_AggressiveSignaturesSub
data.value: ClamAV every 2 h and YARA rules every 12 h (instead of 4 h / 24 h).

data.name: Remed_Step_NoRun
data.value: Do not run this program again until it has been reviewed.

data.name: Remed_Step_YaraReview
data.value: Review the triggered YARA rule (false positives are possible on legitimate tools).

data.name: Remed_Step_Restore
data.value: If this is a mistake, restore from quarantine or the safety backup.

data.name: Remed_Step_NoRepairNote
data.value: ClamAV cannot repair infected binaries — only isolation or deletion is possible.

data.name: Opt_RemovableScan
data.value: Scan USB drives and SD cards

data.name: Opt_RemovableScanSub
data.value: Runs an automatic scan on insert (drives under 64 GB by default).

data.name: Opt_RemovableDetailedSub
data.value: Every file on the drive (slower). Otherwise: risky extensions only (exe, scripts, Office macros…), up to 4,000 files.

data.name: Opt_IncludeRemovableFull
data.value: Include removable drives in full scan

data.name: Opt_IncludeRemovableFullSub
data.value: Adds USB/SD volumes to manual or scheduled full scans.

data.name: Opt_AutoQuarSub
data.value: Any detected threat (manual scan, real-time, or scheduled) is quarantined — never deleted automatically

data.name: Opt_AutoSigSub
data.value: freshclam.exe runs periodically in the background

data.name: Opt_RecThresholdsSub
data.value: Delays after which a recommendation appears on the home screen

data.name: Opt_ScheduledSub
data.value: Task « optiCombat_DailyScan » (--fullscan --quiet). Administrator rights recommended for system folders.

data.name: Opt_UpdateHint
data.value: optiCombat does not automatically download a new program version. ClamAV signatures and YARA rules are managed under Antivirus → Signatures.

data.name: Opt_ExclNote
data.value: Excluded paths are not scanned by ClamAV or YARA.

data.name: Clamd_NotReady
data.value: The clamd service is not available.

data.name: Opt_UseClamdSub
data.value: In-memory ClamAV daemon; falls back to clamscan if unavailable.

data.name: Opt_GameModeSub
data.value: Fewer notifications; defers scheduled headless scans while fullscreen.

data.name: Opt_VirusTotalSub
data.value: Sends only the file SHA-256 hash for cloud reputation lookup.

data.name: VT_NoApiKey
data.value: Add a VirusTotal API key in Options.

data.name: Main_FooterFree
data.value: Free software — designed in Vanier (Ottawa), Canada

data.name: Main_ClamNotFound
data.value: ClamAV was not found on this computer.

data.name: Rec_CleanSuggest
data.value: Consider cleaning temporary files and caches (Clean menu) if you have not done so recently.

data.name: Rec_CleanRecent
data.value: Last cleanup recorded on {0} — low priority.

data.name: Rec_ActNone
data.value: No scans in history — run a quick scan (Antivirus).

data.name: Rec_ActThreats
data.value: Last 30 days: {0} threat(s) reported — see History / Scan tab.

data.name: Rec_ActOk
data.value: Scan history available — open the History tab for details.

data.name: Rec_ClamMissing
data.value: ClamAV not installed — antivirus scans are disabled. Install ClamAV via the Antivirus tab.

data.name: Rec_SigAutoOff
data.value: Automatic signature updates disabled — your definitions may become outdated. Enable in Options.

data.name: Rec_SigStale
data.value: ClamAV signatures older than {0} days — run an update (Antivirus or Options).

data.name: Rec_SigNeverUpdated
data.value: ClamAV signatures have never been updated — run a first update via the Antivirus tab.

data.name: Hist_DetailSelectScan
data.value: Select a scan to view details (threats, errors, status).

data.name: Hist_EmptyCleansSub
data.value: System clean sessions will appear here.

data.name: Hist_EmptyQuarantineSub
data.value: Files placed in quarantine will appear here.

data.name: Hist_EmptyAllSub
data.value: Scans, cleanups, and security actions will appear here.

data.name: Hist_EmptyThreatsSub
data.value: Scans with untreated threats will show here.

data.name: Hist_EmptyCleanScansSub
data.value: Scans with no threats detected will appear here.

data.name: Hist_TooltipManageInAv
data.value: Opens the Antivirus quarantine tab to restore or delete.

data.name: Hist_TooltipViewSourceScan
data.value: Shows the antivirus scan that led to this quarantine action.

data.name: Hist_DetailSelectClean
data.value: Select a cleanup to view the operation log.

data.name: Hist_DetailThreatsLegacy
data.value: (Session saved before threat path details were stored. Run a new scan for full details.)

data.name: Hist_TooltipTreatInAv
data.value: Opens the Scan tab with this session's threats so you can quarantine, ignore, or delete them.

data.name: Hist_SelectScanHint
data.value: Select an entry above to view details.

data.name: Hist_NoThreatsInSession
data.value: No threats detected in this scan.

data.name: Hist_ThreatsLegacy
data.value: Threats detected (paths not stored in this session). Run a new scan for details.

data.name: Hist_TooltipQuarantineAll
data.value: Quarantines every threat listed for this session.

data.name: Hist_TooltipDismiss
data.value: Removes this threat from history (file missing or drive unplugged).

data.name: Hist_DetailCleanSummary
Hist_ExportPdfSelect
data.value: Select a row on the Antivirus Scan tab, then click Export PDF (selection).

data.name: Status_ExportNoHistory
data.value: No scan is recorded in history. Run a scan from the Antivirus tab first.

data.name: Opt_SchedTaskFailed
data.value: Could not create the Windows scheduled task (schtasks). Check permissions or the user account name.

data.name: Opt_SchedRunFailed
data.value: Could not start the task now (schtasks /Run).

data.name: Opt_SchedRunOk
data.value: Task « optiCombat_DailyScan » was triggered. The scan runs in the background (--fullscan --quiet).

data.name: Opt_SchedActiveUnknown
data.value: Task active — next run time unavailable (schtasks).

data.name: Opt_ExclNeedFolder
data.value: Enter an existing folder or use Browse…

data.name: Opt_ExclFolderPickerDesc
data.value: Select a folder to exclude from scans

data.name: Runtime_ReadySummary
data.value: ClamAV and YARA engines are ready.

data.name: Runtime_DevCopyHint
data.value: During development: copy clamav/x64 and yara/ under optiCombat/,

data.name: Runtime_ClamNoFreshclam
data.value: clamscan OK; freshclam.exe missing (limited signature updates).

data.name: Runtime_ClamMissing
data.value: Download ClamAV win.x64 and copy the binaries (README § 3.2).

data.name: Runtime_YaraBinMissing
data.value: Copy yara{0}.exe and yarac{0}.exe into yara/.

data.name: Runtime_YaracMissing
data.value: yarac missing — compile on first scan.

data.name: Upd_NotConfigured
Upd_StagingError
Vm_HistReviewLoaded
data.value: Session from {0:dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm} — {1} threat(s) loaded for remediation.

data.name: Scan_Zone_Done
data.value: Zone {0}/{1} done — {2:N0} file(s) scanned so far

data.name: YaraForge_ContactError
data.value: Could not contact the update server: {0}

data.name: YaraForge_AlreadyUpToDate
data.value: Detection rules are already up to date.

data.name: YaraForge_PackageNotFound
data.value: Rules package not found in the latest release.

data.name: Vm_QuarantinePartial
data.value: {0:N0} of {1:N0} shown — click Load more for the rest.

data.name: Vm_ScanProgressEstimated
data.value: About {0:N0} file(s) to scan — scan in progress…

data.name: Freshclam_AlreadyUpdating
data.value: ClamAV update is already in progress.

data.name: Freshclam_ExeNotFound
data.value: freshclam.exe not found — using local signatures.

data.name: Freshclam_SuccessUpToDate
data.value: ClamAV signatures are already up to date.

data.name: Freshclam_CancelledTimeout
data.value: Update cancelled (timeout {0} min or manual stop).

data.name: Freshclam_LogCvdCertMissing
data.value: clamav.crt not found — check installation or network connection.

data.name: Vm_YaraUnavailable
data.value: YARA unavailable (missing yara64.exe or no rules)

data.name: Vm_SigEngineReloaded
data.value: Detection engine: rules updated (reload on next scan)

data.name: Opt_SchedUacHint
data.value: The scheduled scan runs headless (--fullscan). Without administrator rights, some system folders are skipped. Use Run as administrator on Home for full coverage.

data.name: Opt_HighContrastSub
data.value: Stronger borders and text for improved readability.

data.name: Scan_FullPartialWithoutAdmin
data.value: Full scan — partial coverage without administrator rights (see Home banner).

data.name: Av_Action_DriveUnavailable
data.value: Drive unavailable ({0}) — reconnect it to quarantine, or remove the threat from history.

data.name: Onboarding_Step1
data.value:
optiCombat protects and cleans your PC locally (ClamAV + YARA).
This quick guide covers three useful first steps.

data.name: Onboarding_Step3
data.value:
Next: run a quick scan with F5 from the Antivirus tab.
Without administrator rights, full and scheduled scans remain partial.

data.name: Hist_TooltipExportPdf
data.value: PDF for the selected row in Antivirus Scan

data.name: Risk_Rec_Critical
data.value: IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: quarantine or delete {0} now.

data.name: Risk_Rec_Major
data.value: Recommended: quarantine {0} as soon as possible.

data.name: Risk_Rec_Minor
data.value: Optional: monitor {0} or quarantine as a precaution.

data.name: Av_Tooltip_UpdateSignatures
data.value: Update ClamAV signatures and YARA rules

data.name: Av_Tooltip_Exclude
data.value: Add to exclusions — this file will no longer be scanned

data.name: Export_Html_Footer
data.value: Report automatically generated by optiCombat {0} ({1}) — {2} · This report is confidential.

data.name: Export_Pdf_ThreatLegacySingle
data.value: Threat detected (details not kept in history)
